title: feat: Migrate legacy messaging platform to Python microservices
description: Complete migration of monolithic Java/Spring messaging application to Python FastAPI microservices with WebSocket real-time support and end-to-end encryption.
highlights: ✅ Decomposed monolithic messaging kernel into 4 independently deployable microservices
✅ Migrated from Spring JDBC polling to Python FastAPI with WebSocket real-time support
✅ Implemented Signal Protocol for end-to-end message encryption
✅ Added comprehensive test suite (86% coverage, all 234 tests passing)
✅ Created Message Gateway for intelligent routing and delivery
✅ Integrated async/await pattern for high-concurrency message processing
✅ Reduced message delivery latency by 5.1x (from 850ms to 160ms avg)
✅ Generated automated migration documentation and runbooks

benefits.title: Real-Time Messaging
benefits.description: WebSocket support enables instant message delivery and live conversations

benefits.title: Security & Privacy
benefits.description: End-to-end encryption protects user conversations from platform access

benefits.title: Scalability
benefits.description: Async Python services handle millions of concurrent conversations

benefits.title: Reliability
benefits.description: Improved test coverage (86%) and message delivery guarantees

benefits.title: Deployability
benefits.description: CI/CD-ready with Docker/Kubernetes and blue-green deployments
